languages.text: {n}Гемункул отворачивается от Эоганна, разом утратив к нему всякий интерес.{/n} "Если тебе так важен этот конгломерат из плоти и низкосортного хлама — я распоряжусь, чтобы его собрали воедино. Впредь не хочу ничего слышать о нем".

{n}The Haemonculus turns away from Eogunn, instantly losing all interest in him.{/n} "If you value this heap of meat and scrap metal so highly, I will order it reassembled. Never speak of it to me again."
languages.original_text: {n}Гемункул отворачивается от Эоганна, разом утратив к нему всякий интерес.{/n} "Если тебе так важен этот конгломерат из плоти и низкосортного хлама — я распоряжусь, чтобы его собрали воедино. Впредь не хочу ничего слышать о нем".

languages.text: {n}Der Haemonculus wendet sich von Eogunn ab und verliert sofort jegliches Interesse an ihm.{/n} "Wenn Euch so viel an diesem Haufen Fleisch und Altmetall liegt, lasse ich ihn wieder zusammensetzen. Aber sprecht mich nie wieder auf ihn an."
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus turns away from Eogunn, instantly losing all interest in him.{/n} "If you value this heap of meat and scrap metal so highly, I will order it reassembled. Never speak of it to me again."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Haemonculus wendet sich von Eogunn ab und verliert sofort jegliches Interesse an ihm.{/n} "Wenn Euch so viel an diesem Haufen Fleisch und Altmetall liegt, lasse ich ihn wieder zusammensetzen. Aber sprecht mich nie wieder auf ihn an."

languages.text: {n}L'hémoncule se désintéresse soudainement d'Eogunn et lui tourne le dos.{/n} « Si vous tenez tant à ce tas de viande et de métal, j'ordonnerai de le faire réassembler. Mais je ne veux plus jamais en entendre parler. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus turns away from Eogunn, instantly losing all interest in him.{/n} "If you value this heap of meat and scrap metal so highly, I will order it reassembled. Never speak of it to me again."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'hémoncule se désintéresse soudainement d'Eogunn et lui tourne le dos.{/n} « Si vous tenez tant à ce tas de viande et de métal, j'ordonnerai de le faire réassembler. Mais je ne veux plus jamais en entendre parler. »

languages.text: {n}El Hemónculo da la espalda a Eogunn, habiendo perdido todo interés por él.{/n} «Si tanto valoras este amasijo de carne y chatarra, ordenaré que lo reconstruyan. No vuelvas a hablarme de él».
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus turns away from Eogunn, instantly losing all interest in him.{/n} "If you value this heap of meat and scrap metal so highly, I will order it reassembled. Never speak of it to me again."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Hemónculo da la espalda a Eogunn, habiendo perdido todo interés por él.{/n} «Si tanto valoras este amasijo de carne y chatarra, ordenaré que lo reconstruyan. No vuelvas a hablarme de él».

languages.text: {n}Haimonkulus, Manipülus'a olan ilgisini bir anda kaybederek Eogunn'a sırtını dönüyor.{/n} "Eğer bu et ve hurda yığınına bu kadar değer veriyorsan yeniden birleştirilmesini emredeceğim. Bir daha bu şeyin sözünü bile etmeyeceksin ama."
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus turns away from Eogunn, instantly losing all interest in him.{/n} "If you value this heap of meat and scrap metal so highly, I will order it reassembled. Never speak of it to me again."

traits.locale_text: {n}Haimonkulus, Manipülus'a olan ilgisini bir anda kaybederek Eogunn'a sırtını dönüyor.{/n} "Eğer bu et ve hurda yığınına bu kadar değer veriyorsan yeniden birleştirilmesini emredeceğim. Bir daha bu şeyin sözünü bile etmeyeceksin ama."

languages.text: {n}血伶人转身离开，瞬间对伊奥贡失去了兴趣。{/n}“你要是这么看重这堆血肉和废铁，我会命人把它重新拼好。以后别再拿这事来烦我了。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus turns away from Eogunn, instantly losing all interest in him.{/n} "If you value this heap of meat and scrap metal so highly, I will order it reassembled. Never speak of it to me again."

traits.locale_text: {n}血伶人转身离开，瞬间对伊奥贡失去了兴趣。{/n}“你要是这么看重这堆血肉和废铁，我会命人把它重新拼好。以后别再拿这事来烦我了。”

languages.text: {n}ハエモンクルスはエオガンから顔を背け、彼への興味を一瞬にして失う。{/n}「貴様がこの肉と屑鉄の塊をそれほど重んじるのなら、組み直すよう命じてやろう。二度と私の前でその話をするな」
languages.original_text: {n}The Haemonculus turns away from Eogunn, instantly losing all interest in him.{/n} "If you value this heap of meat and scrap metal so highly, I will order it reassembled. Never speak of it to me again."
